Package ui.card

Class CardRenderer

java.lang.Object
ui.render.Renderer<Card>
ui.card.CardRenderer
public class CardRenderer extends Renderer<Card>
Renderer for Card components. Handles composite rendering of card material, suit, and value, as well as shadows.

  • Method Details

    • render

      public void render(Card card, javafx.scene.layout.Pane node, GridPos pos, boolean animating)
      Renders a card with standard centering and shadows.
      Specified by:
      render in class Renderer<Card>
      Parameters:
      card - The card to render.
      node - The Pane to render into.
      pos - The grid position.
      animating - True if currently animating.

    • render

      public void render(Card card, javafx.scene.layout.Pane node, GridPos pos, boolean animating, boolean centerToTile, boolean showShadow)
      Renders a card with configurable options for centering and shadows.
      Parameters:
      card - The card to render.
      node - The Pane to render into.
      pos - The grid position.
      animating - True if currently animating.
      centerToTile - Whether to center the card within the tile.
      showShadow - Whether to draw a drop shadow under the card.

    • onAnimationComplete

      public void onAnimationComplete(Card card, GridPos from, GridPos to)
      Callback invoked when a card movement animation is complete.
      Parameters:
      card - The card that moved.
      from - The origin position.
      to - The target position.

    • onMovementEvent

      public void onMovementEvent(AfterMovementEvent event)
      Responds to an AfterMovementEvent by starting animations for all moving cards.
      Parameters:
      event - The event data.

    • layer

      public RenderLayer layer()
      Returns the render layer for cards.
      Specified by:
      layer in class Renderer<Card>
      Returns:
      RenderLayer.CARD.
